prompt: A surreal diptych in dreamlike surrealism style: left panel shows dozens of small shadowy silhouettes, each isolated with few thin faint connections linking them sparsely like fragile threads; right panel reveals those same silhouettes now central in a vast web of thick radiant connections exploding outward to countless distant figures. Rendered in muted grays and blues on left contrasting vibrant golds and reds on right, with impossible Escher-like topology where lines bend unnaturally, evoking an uncanny reversal of isolation into centrality and vice versa, high contrast, ethereal fog, no text or numbers.
metaphor: Left: isolated silhouettes with sparse threads. Right: same silhouettes hyper-connected to masses. Contrast maps reversal where average from others exceeds one's own.
